title: ABB Aurora Solar Inverter
description: Integration for ABB Aurora solar inverters via TCP

user.description: Enter the connection details for your ABB Aurora inverter. Host and port cannot be changed later — to use a different inverter, remove and re-add the integration.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Check host, port and slave ID.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the HA logs for details.
